_about: Per-row override controlling which Lean blocks the website displays. When a ref appears here with a non-empty `primary` list, only those blocks are shown (matched exactly by their `part` text), in the order given. Blocks not listed are treated as helpers and hidden from the right pane — they still live in the .lean source file and are reachable via 'View Lean source'.
_convention_note: If you'd rather tag visibility in the Lean files themselves, add a `[primary]` / `[helper]` tag to the marker (e.g. `-- def_3_4 (item 1, length) [helper]`). fetch_row.py honours those tags first; this JSON is the bridge while we're still adding tags.
